stemHtml: Which one of the following statements is correct concerning the movement of the ITCZ in the region of West Africa?

options.a: It oscillates during the year between 10°N and 10°S.
options.b: It reaches its maximum northerly position of 15°N - 20°N in July.
options.c: It oscillates during the year between the Equator and 10°N.
options.d: It reaches its maximum southerly position of 5°S in January.
